title: cassine dichotoma
intro: Cassine dichotoma, also known as Poison Ivy of the West Indies, is a shrub native to the Caribbean region and parts of Central and South America. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cassine dichotoma include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cassine dichotoma can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although caution should be taken due to its potential skin-irritating effects.
